_schema.drafts: Queue of generated social posts awaiting approval, scheduled, or posted.

draftShape.type: string — band_announce | menu_spotlight | weather_patio | event_promo | wine_club | brand_post | manual
draftShape.caption: string — main post copy
draftShape.hashtags: ['#hashtag1','#hashtag2'] — appended to caption for IG, optional for FB
draftShape.imageUrl: string — public URL of the hero image (uploaded or AI-generated)
draftShape.linkUrl: string — optional link card target (FB only — IG strips links from feed)
draftShape.fbPostId: string | null — Facebook post ID after publish
draftShape.igMediaId: string | null — Instagram media ID after publish

drafts.caption: Spring reds are pouring at The Quarry. This week's feature is a silky Willamette Valley Pinot Noir — earthy, bright, and built for a long evening on the patio. Rock & Vine members get it by the glass at member pricing, every visit.
drafts.imagePrompt: Close-up of a single stemmed wine glass filled with deep ruby Pinot Noir on a weathered oak bar top, warm golden hour light streaming in from the left, soft bokeh of string lights and a blurred patio in the background, no people, no text, rich earthy tones

drafts.caption: Wood-fired and finished with truffle oil, our mushroom flatbread is earthy, crisp-edged, and built for a glass of something red. On the menu Wednesday through Sunday.
drafts.imagePrompt: Close-up overhead photo of a wood-fired flatbread topped with roasted wild mushrooms, fresh thyme, and a drizzle of truffle oil on a dark slate serving board, wisps of steam rising, warm golden restaurant lighting, softly blurred wine glasses and candle in background, rich earthy tones

graphicBrief.templateRef: Lifestyle poster — wine glass + Quarry view, "Rock & Vine" branding

spec.backgroundIdea: Wine glass, sunset over Quarry lake, member tasting moment
spec.title: JOIN ROCK & VINE
spec.subtitle: May 2026 membership now open
spec.footerText: THE QUARRY  •  ROCK & VINE WINE CLUB

graphicBrief.canvasNote: Now Accepting Members — recurring monthly post for the Rock & Vine Wine Club.

drafts.caption: May is open for Rock & Vine Wine Club members. Each month: two curated bottles, a private tasting, and member-only events at the Quarry. No commitment beyond the month you're in.
drafts.imagePrompt: Two bottles of wine — one red, one white — resting on a weathered wooden barrel outdoors, late afternoon golden light, soft bokeh of stone cliff and lake in background, warm neutral tones with a single folded card leaning against the bottles

variants.facebook: May is open for Rock & Vine Wine Club members. Every month you get two hand-picked bottles, access to a private tasting at the Quarry, and invites to member-only events — no long-term commitment required. If you've been thinking about it, this is a good month to start.
variants.instagram: May is open for Rock & Vine Wine Club members. Two curated bottles, a private tasting, member events. No long commitment.

drafts.aiReasoning: Arc step is 'Now Accepting Members' — this is a lifestyle-and-belonging open-door moment, so the copy leads with access and low friction rather than urgency or sign-up pressure, matching the brand's 'members get…' guidance for wine club posts.

drafts.caption: Rock & Vine Wine Club members get more than a bottle. Monthly curated selections, exclusive tastings, and early access to member events — all out here in Defiance Wine Country. May selections are in. Join before the month's out.
drafts.imagePrompt: Two glasses of white and rosé wine side by side on a weathered stone ledge, late afternoon golden light, soft-focus view of a calm lake and limestone cliffs behind, warm neutral tones, string lights beginning to glow in the background, no faces, no text

variants.facebook: Rock & Vine Wine Club members get more than a bottle each month. Curated selections, exclusive tastings, and member-only events — all at The Quarry in New Melle. May selections are in. If you've been thinking about joining, now's a good time.
variants.instagram: Rock & Vine Wine Club — monthly curated wines, tastings, and member events out in Defiance Wine Country. May selections are in.

drafts.aiReasoning: Mid-month member benefit spotlight calls for lifestyle and belonging tone — this copy leads with what members get, not a hard sell, and closes with a soft nudge to join before May closes out.

graphicBrief.templateRef: Match the 3-card "LIVE BANDS AT THE QUARRY" poster you already use

spec.backgroundIdea: Quarry lake/patio at golden hour or evening string lights
spec.title: LIVE BANDS THIS WEEKEND
spec.footerText: THE QUARRY  •  GREAT VIEWS  •  GREAT FOOD  •  GOOD TIMES

graphicBrief.canvasNote: Weekend Lineup — covers 4 band(s). Post 3 days before first show.
graphicBrief.reelBrief: Open with a slow pan across the stone patio at dusk — string lights just coming on, empty tables set. Cut to a close-up of a wine glass catching the last of the golden hour light. Hold 3s. End on a wide shot of the cliff and lake. Text overlay: 'Live music this weekend. No cover. Just come.' Suggested audio: laid-back acoustic or country-adjacent instrumental.

drafts.caption: The August Plein Air Painters are here today. Artists paint New Melle starting at 1 PM, then bring their work to The Quarry at 5 PM — judging starts at 5:30. Come see the paintings, stay for the evening.
drafts.imagePrompt: A painter's wooden easel set up near a limestone cliff edge overlooking a still quarry lake, warm afternoon light, lush green Missouri landscape in background, no people, no text, golden hour glow

variants.facebook:
Four acts. Two days. No cover charge.

This Saturday, Dave Caputo plays 1–4 PM — a great reason to grab a table for lunch and stay a while. Then Boots and Bourbon (DJ) keeps it going from 6–11 PM.

Sunday, Mixology is on from 1–4 PM. And next Friday, May 8, Scott and Liz close out the week from 7–10 PM.

All live music is free with your visit. We're open Wed–Sun at 3960 Highway Z, New Melle.
variants.instagram:
Four acts this weekend. No cover.

Sat: Dave Caputo 1–4 PM · Boots and Bourbon (DJ) 6–11 PM
Sun: Mixology 1–4 PM
Fri 5/8: Scott and Liz 7–10 PM

Free with your visit.

drafts.aiReasoning: At T-3 the post shifts to 'this Saturday' specificity — the full weekend grid gives followers everything they need to plan, while the 'no cover, come as you are' close keeps the tone as an invitation rather than a pitch, consistent with band post guidance.
drafts.lastInstructions: THIS IS HIGHLIGHTING THE PAINT OUT SHOW AND SALE AT THE QUARRY. THE AUGUST PLAIN AIR PAINTERS IN NEW MELLE AT 1 PM AND THEN WE HAVE THE QUARRY TONIGHT AT 5 PM AND JUDGING STARTS AT 5:30 PM. COME DOWN TO THE QUARRY TODAY
drafts.failureReason: Meta API auth error: page access token revoked or expired (FB 400 OAuth). Refresh META_PAGE_ACCESS_TOKEN env var.

End on a wide patio shot at dusk. Suggested audio: soft acoustic country, upbeat but unhurried. Text overlay: 'Janet Martin — Live Tonight 7 PM'.

drafts.caption: Janet Martin is live tonight, 7–10 PM. No cover, no ticket — just show up and stay a while.
drafts.imagePrompt: Acoustic guitar leaning against a wooden stool on a warmly lit indoor stage, string lights glowing overhead, stone wall backdrop softly out of focus, golden evening light, no people, no text

variants.facebook: Janet Martin plays tonight from 7 to 10 PM. Live music is always free here — no cover, no reservation needed. Come as you are.
variants.instagram: Janet Martin is live tonight, 7–10 PM. No cover. Just show up.

drafts.aiReasoning: T-0 calls for short, present-tense energy — 'tonight' specificity with the time, zero friction messaging (no cover, walk in), and an inviting close that fits the vibe-forward tone for a band post.

context.eventDescription:
Our Music Bingo nights have been SELLING OUT… so we’re turning it up 🔥

🎶 70s • 80s • 90s MUSIC BINGO
📅 May 22nd, 2026
📍 The Quarry
👥 Tables of 4
🍻 Beer bucket OR bottle of wine per table
🏆 Prizes all night long

graphicBrief.templateRef: Event poster — match Boots & Bourbon / Live Bands template style

spec.title: 70S • 80S • 90S MUSIC BINGO
spec.subtitle:
Our Music Bingo nights have been SELLING OUT… so we’re turning it up 🔥

🎶 70s • 80s • 90s MUSIC BI

graphicBrief.canvasNote: One Week Away — Post 7 days before event.
graphicBrief.reelBrief: Open with a slow pan across a bingo card on a table set for four, beer bucket in frame. Cut to a quick montage of wine being poured, a prize being held up, people reacting (no faces needed — hands, glasses, cards). End on the table setup with string lights overhead. Suggested audio: upbeat 80s synth instrumental or a recognizable 80s hit snippet. Text overlay: '70s • 80s • 90s Music Bingo / May 22 / The Quarry / Link in bio'.

drafts.caption: Music Bingo is back — and this one hits different. 70s, 80s, and 90s hits, tables of 4, a beer bucket or bottle of wine included, and prizes all night. Friday, May 22 at 5:30pm. Seats are $80/table and past nights have sold out. Link in bio to grab yours.
drafts.imagePrompt: Overhead shot of a bingo card on a dark wood table next to a sweating beer bottle and two wine glasses, warm string-light bokeh in background, vintage 80s cassette tape resting beside the card as a prop, golden evening light, no faces, no text on card

variants.facebook: Music Bingo is back — and this one covers three decades of hits. 70s, 80s, and 90s all night long, tables of 4, a beer bucket or bottle of wine included per table, and prizes throughout the night. Friday, May 22 at 5:30pm. Seats are $80/table. Past nights have sold out — grab your table now: [LINK]
variants.instagram: 70s, 80s, and 90s Music Bingo — May 22 at 5:30pm. Tables of 4, wine or beer included, prizes all night. $80/table. Link in bio.

drafts.aiReasoning: At T-7 with 38% fill, this is a value-push moment — the caption leads with what you get (three decades, drinks included, prizes) and names the sell-out history as soft social proof without manufactured urgency.

drafts.caption:
This weekend at The Quarry — four live acts, no cover.

Saturday: Scott Logan (1–4 PM) + BP Duo (7–10 PM)
Sunday: Garden Party (1–4 PM)

Plus Kelli Renee is up next Thursday, May 15 (7–10 PM).

Just show up. 3960 Highway Z, New Melle.

This weekend at The Quarry — four live acts, no cover.

Saturday: Mixology 1–4 PM · James Jones 7–10 PM

Saturday: Mixology 1–4 PM, then James Jones takes the evening 7–10 PM.

drafts.caption:
Yoga on the patio. Wine after. That's the plan.

Un-Wine-D & Align is a Saturday morning outdoor yoga session with Yoga with Charity — June 6, 9–10 AM. All levels welcome. Afterward, unwind with a glass of wine, mimosa, or bloody mary, plus 10% off brunch.

Spots are limited to 25. Tickets are $20. Link to register below.
drafts.imagePrompt: Wide shot of a serene outdoor stone patio at golden morning light, yoga mat rolled out on wooden deck facing a calm quarry lake with limestone cliffs in soft background, a single glass of white wine and a mimosa set on a nearby stone ledge, string lights still visible overhead in early daylight, warm peachy-blue morning sky, no people, no text

variants.facebook:

Spots are capped at 25. Tickets are $20. Grab yours at the link.
